title: Bouncy Briny Broccoli Porridge
description: A hearty and satisfying porridge dish combining the earthy flavors of broccoli and briny ingredients.

ingredients.name: briny
ingredients.notes: brine from a jar of pickled vegetables

instructions: Bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
Add 2 cups of broccoli florets and cook until tender.
In a separate pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Gradually mix in 1 cup of porridge.
Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the brine from a jar of pickled vegetables.
Combine cooked broccoli and porridge mixture in a bowl.
Serve warm, garnished with additional broccoli if desired.
